sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.4g. the fat quality is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, being sweet is normal, but controlling it is what matters.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.4g. the fat quality is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, being sweet is normal, but controlling it is what matters.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 75g. the fibre support is doing a lot of the work. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 75g. the fibre support is doing a lot of the work. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 2.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 2.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 0% DV, vitamin a at 3% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 0% DV, vitamin a at 3% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 15% DV, magnesium at 11% DV, iron at 6% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 15% DV, magnesium at 11% DV, iron at 6% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. still brings some useful minerals because not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit. can be useful in high-energy contexts because there are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful. still a recognisable whole fruit because that matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first. still brings some useful minerals because not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit. can be useful in high-energy contexts because there are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful. still a recognisable whole fruit because that matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. sugar density is a major category problem because fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard. glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit because much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour. dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher because this is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

displayItems.title: sugar density is a major category problem
displayItems.explanation: Fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard.

displayItems.title: glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit
displayItems.explanation: Much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour.

displayItems.title: dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher
displayItems.explanation: This is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

sections.subtitleText: on the weaker side. sugar density is a major category problem because fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard. glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit because much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour. dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher because this is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

closing.summary: still brings some useful minerals and can be useful in high-energy contexts help dates. but sugar density is a major category problem and glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit drag it down hard. best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 16 from a base nutrition score of 25. Context dragged it down by 9 points.
